overall.description: A first-person perspective walk along a dirt trail through a rocky canyon beside a river. The camera approaches and passes a wooden covered bridge structure in a high-fidelity video game environment with detailed natural lighting and textures.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the dirt trail between a rocky cliff on the left and a river channel on the right

entered.detail: steep rocky cliff face with patches of grass and shrubs
narrow river flowing alongside the dirt path
worn dirt path with tire tracks and scattered stones
rolling rocky terrain visible in the distance ahead

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a steady walk along a narrow dirt trail carved between a steep rocky cliff on the left and a river channel on the right. The canyon walls create an enclosed feeling while the clear blue sky remains visible overhead. Sparse vegetation dots the rocky slopes.

scene_state.functional_zone: approaching wooden covered bridge over river

events.description: wooden covered bridge becomes visible in the distance ahead
camera slows slightly while approaching the bridge structure

agents.ego_description: continuing along the path as the wooden covered bridge grows larger in the frame, preparing to pass it

entered.detail: dark wooden covered bridge with sloped roof spanning the river channel

segments.scene_description: As the walk continues, a wooden covered bridge appears in the distance and gradually approaches. The camera moves steadily toward the structure, which sits on wooden pilings over the river. The surrounding vegetation becomes slightly denser with taller grasses along the riverbank.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky trail past the bridge with forested valley ahead

events.description: passing the wooden bridge on the right and continuing into the more open valley beyond

agents.ego_description: walking past the bridge structure and continuing along the winding dirt path toward the forested valley

entered.detail: dense green forest visible in the valley ahead beyond the rocky terrain

segments.scene_description: The camera passes the wooden covered bridge on the right, leaving it behind as the path continues toward a more forested area. The terrain opens slightly into a valley view with dense trees visible in the distance. The river remains visible on the right side of the path.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a narrow rocky canyon that gradually opens into a wider, forested valley. It begins with a steady walk along a dirt trail squeezed between a steep cliff and a river channel under a clear blue sky. As the camera advances, a wooden covered bridge emerges in the distance and grows larger, while the surrounding vegetation shifts from sparse rocky slopes to denser grasses along the riverbank. The scene then transitions as the camera passes the bridge on the right, leaving the structure behind to follow the path toward a more open landscape. Finally, the terrain expands into a valley view where the river continues alongside the trail toward a distant, dense forest.
